# FPV Flight-Control Lab

FPV Flight-Control Lab is a collection of open FPV flight-control hardware,
INAV firmware experiments, and Blackbox-based PID/filter tuning tools by
GitHub user 19379353560.

## Main Site

- Portfolio: https://19379353560.github.io/
- Updates: https://19379353560.github.io/updates.html

## Projects

- SkyPilot H743: open STM32H743 flight-controller hardware for INAV with
  ICM42688P IMU, EasyEDA Pro files, INAV 9.0.1 firmware files, and hardware
  review requests.
  - Page: https://19379353560.github.io/skypilot.html
  - Repository: https://github.com/19379353560/skypilot
  - Review issue: https://github.com/19379353560/skypilot/issues/1

- 75A 4-in-1 ESC: open FPV ESC hardware project with Gerbers, schematic PDF,
  PCB previews, DSHOT600 notes, and high-current review requests.
  - Page: https://19379353560.github.io/esc.html
  - Repository: https://github.com/19379353560/DIY_Flight_Controller_and_4in1_ESC
  - Review issue: https://github.com/19379353560/DIY_Flight_Controller_and_4in1_ESC/issues/1

- INAV PID Tuner: FastAPI tool for analyzing INAV Blackbox logs and generating
  cautious PID/filter tuning suggestions.
  - Page: https://19379353560.github.io/pid-tuner.html
  - Repository: https://github.com/19379353560/inav-pid-tuner
  - Log request: https://github.com/19379353560/inav-pid-tuner/issues/1

- INAV D-term pre-diff LPF: upstream INAV firmware work for an optional
  pre-differentiation low-pass filter on D-term input, with the feature disabled
  by default while flight-test data is collected.
  - Page: https://19379353560.github.io/inav-dterm-lpf.html
  - Active upstream PR: https://github.com/iNavFlight/inav/pull/11464
  - Flight-test request: https://github.com/19379353560/inav/issues/1

## Contribution Requests

The most useful feedback is hardware review, safe bench-test notes, anonymized
INAV Blackbox logs, and flight-test comparisons for `dterm_lpf2_hz`.
